{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Monarch of Everwood
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Monarch of Everwood]] issues a command to show themselves.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A voice drifted on the wind, a soft command from the Monarch of Everwood. “Show yourselves.”<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
